Package recoder.service

Class DefaultImplicitElementInfo

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.service.DefaultProgramModelInfo
recoder.service.DefaultImplicitElementInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Service, ImplicitElementInfo, ProgramModelInfo, TuningParameters
public class DefaultImplicitElementInfo extends DefaultProgramModelInfo implements ImplicitElementInfo
Handles requests for implicitely defined program model elements. In particular these are NullType, Package,ArrayType, DefaultConstructor, ImplicitEnumValueOf, ImplicitEnumValues, and IntersectionType.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class recoder.AbstractService

  • Method Details

    • getDefaultConstructor

      public DefaultConstructor getDefaultConstructor(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ImplicitElementInfo
      Returns the default constructor associated with the given class type, or null if there is none.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultConstructor in interface ImplicitElementInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the default constructor of the given type, or null.

    • getImplicitEnumMethods

      public List<ImplicitEnumMethod> getImplicitEnumMethods(EnumDeclaration etd)
      Specified by:
      getImplicitEnumMethods in interface ImplicitElementInfo

    • getType

      public Type getType(ProgramModelElement pme)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the type of the given program model element. For types this is the model element itself, for variables it is their defined type and for methods it is their statically defined return type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      pme - the program model element to analyze.
      Returns:
      the type of the program element or null if the type is unknown or unavailable.

    • getPackage

      public Package getPackage(ProgramModelElement pme)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the package of the given program model element.
      Specified by:
      getPackage in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      pme - a program model element.
      Returns:
      the package of that object (may be null).

    • getTypes

      public List<? extends ClassType> getTypes(ClassTypeContainer ctc)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the class types locally defined within the given container. Returns inner types when the container itself is a class type. Note that there is no guarantee about the order of the types returned.
      Specified by:
      getTypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ctc - a class type container.
      Returns:
      a list of contained class types.

    • getAllTypes

      public List<ClassType> getAllTypes(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns all class types that are member types of the given class types, including visible inherited types. The list does not contain all declared classes; instead, classes not visible to the given class (e.g. private or hidden ones) are filtered already.
      Specified by:
      getAllTypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      getAllTypes in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      a list of class types that are members of the given type or any of its supertypes.
      See Also:
      • ProgramModelInfo.getAllSupertypes(recoder.abstraction.ClassType)

    • getClassTypeContainer

      public ClassTypeContainer getClassTypeContainer(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the class type container for the given class type.
      Specified by:
      getClassTypeContainer in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the container of the given type.

    • getSupertypes

      public List<ClassType> getSupertypes(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the list of locally declared supertypes of the given class type.
      Specified by:
      getSupertypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of locally defined supertypes of the given type.

    • getAllSupertypes

      public List<ClassType> getAllSupertypes(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the list of all supertypes of the given class type, in topological order, including the class type itself as first element. The order allows to resolve member overloading or overloading.
      Specified by:
      getAllSupertypes in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      getAllSupertypes in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of all supertypes of the given type in topological order.

    • getFields

      public List<? extends Field> getFields(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the fields locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getFields in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of field members of the given type.

    • getAllFields

      public List<Field> getAllFields(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns all visible fields that are defined in the given class type or any of its supertypes. The fields are in topological order with respect to the inheritance hierarchy. The list does not contain all declared fields; instead, fields not visible to the given class (e.g. private or hidden ones) are filtered already.
      Specified by:
      getAllFields in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      getAllFields in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of visible field members of the given type and its supertypes.

    • getMethods

      public List<Method> getMethods(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the methods locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getMethods in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of methods of the given type.

    • getAllMethods

      public List<Method> getAllMethods(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns all visible methods that are defined in the given class type or any of its supertypes. The methods are in topological order with respect to the inheritance hierarchy. The list does not contain all declared methods; instead, methods not visible to the given class (e.g. private or hidden ones) are filtered already.
      Specified by:
      getAllMethods in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      getAllMethods in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of visible methods of the given type and its supertypes.

    • getConstructors

      public List<Constructor> getConstructors(ClassType ct)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Returns the constructors locally defined within the given class type. If the type is represented in source code, the returned list matches the syntactic order.
      Specified by:
      getConstructors in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      ct - a class type.
      Returns:
      the list of constructors of the given type.
